title: Strength Superset
description: Intense push-pull superset with Hindu push-ups, dips and complete back work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Butt kicks
exercises.instructions: Run in place, heels to glutes

exercises.name: Inchworms
exercises.instructions: Standing, walk hands forward into a plank, then walk back

exercises.name: Scapular push-ups
exercises.instructions: In a plank, retract and protract the shoulder blades without bending the elbows

exercises.name: Hindu push-ups
exercises.instructions: Diving motion: dive down then arc back up

exercises.name: Inverted row (table)
exercises.instructions: Under a table, pull the chest to the edge

exercises.name: Chair dips
exercises.instructions: Hands on the edge, elbows back, lower to 90 degrees

exercises.name: Superman
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, lift arms and legs simultaneously, hold 2s

exercises.name: Diamond push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands together under the chest, elbows close to the body

exercises.name: Back extensions
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, lift chest off the floor, squeeze shoulder blades

exercises.name: Chest stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm against a wall at 90 degrees, pivot the body

exercises.name: Triceps stretch
exercises.instructions: Arm behind the head, pull the elbow with the other hand

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, bring the foot to the opposite hand, twisting

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
